hero_headline: Seafront Villa with Private Pool Steps from the Marina in Sitges

highlights.text: Sleeps up to 6 guests across 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms.
Rated 4.96 out of 5 across 87 guest reviews.
Guests rave about the stunning sea views, spotless private pool, and easy walk to the old town.
Located near the marina in Sitges, Spain, with the old town just a ten-minute stroll away.
Flexible booking: full refund available up to 30 days before arrival.

about_section: Casa del Mar is a bright three-bedroom villa in Sitges, Spain, set steps from the marina with beautiful sea views. The villa features a private pool and is within a ten-minute walk of the old town. With space for up to 6 guests and an average review score of 4.96 from 87 stays, it consistently delights visitors looking for a seafront escape.

amenity_descriptions.text: Enjoy your own private pool, perfect for cooling off in the Spanish sun.
Stay comfortable year-round with air conditioning throughout the villa.
Stay connected with broadband internet access during your stay.
A dishwasher makes tidying up after meals quick and effortless.
Free parking is available, so arriving by car is completely hassle-free.
